name: Multiple injured in shop accident Midvale, how claims work?

mainEntity.name: Multiple injured in shop accident Midvale, how claims work?

acceptedAnswer.description: Each files separate comp claim; witnesses strengthen all; third-party possible.[3][4] Co-employee not suable.[4] Key factors: (1) Individual proofs; (2) Shared evidence; (3) Hearings separate; (4) Consistency across.[3] Coordinate statements carefully. Independent but interconnected cases.
